summary: Iteration 12 — Quick-Win Sprint (Features 1 CTWA, 2 Quick Replies, 4 Cart Recovery, 6 Impersonation, 7 Green Tick) + sidebar IA collapse. Backend 15/15 pytest PASS (~92s incl. live 90-second scheduler wait). Frontend: ZERO console errors, ZERO page errors across tenant + super-admin. Sidebar IA verified: all 5 group headers (Engage, Customers, Insights, Build, Account) render with all 17 renamed items (Dashboard, Campaigns, Chatbots, Templates, Marketplace, Inbox, Leads & CRM, Auto-replies, Analytics, Delivery, Channels, Developer, Team, Wallet, Subscription, Support, Settings) — every expected data-testid resolves. Super-admin sidebar unchanged (6 items). Impersonation flow fully verified end-to-end: 10 'View as' buttons in Tenants tab → click → yellow amber banner with correct 'Viewing as {email} at {company} · impersonated by superadmin@wabridge.com' text → sidebar swaps to tenant nav → 'Return to platform' restores super-admin session and redirects to /app/admin?tab=tenants. Green Tick Wizard card renders on /app/whatsapp with green-emerald border, [data-testid=green-tick-step-0] checkbox toggle works. data-testid=manage-quick-replies IS present on /app/chat. CTWA badge gracefully omitted when no referral data (no errors). Scheduler polling interval 30s — scheduled doc transitioned pending→sent/failed within the 120s window verified by test_scheduler_processes_due.

issues: Produces 'nav-pricing---discounts' (triple dash) — pre-existing from iter11, selector still works but consider collapsing repeat dashes with .replace(/-+/g,'-').

Conversation list rows have no data-testid (e.g. conversation-{id}) and the click handler sits on a div with no stable CSS selector — made Playwright coverage of slash-trigger & quick-reply modal interactions brittle. Recommend adding data-testid=\"conversation-{id}\" on each row for reliable automation.

action_items: (Nice-to-have) Add data-testid=\"conversation-{id}\" on chat list rows in Chat.jsx so slash-trigger/quick-reply modal/CTWA-badge UI flows can be reliably automated in future runs.

(Nice-to-have) To make CTWA badge visually testable, extend /api/whatsapp/simulate-inbound to accept an optional referral payload so e2e can seed a conversation with source='ctwa' without hitting real Meta webhooks.
critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.py handles credential-missing (no_credential → status=failed) and per-row exceptions defensively with find_one_and_update atomic claim — good; no double-send risk.
quick_replies.py normalizes shortcut to lowercase snake_case before duplicate check and before storage — correct; dup test returns 400 cleanly.

admin.py impersonate — correctly picks first admin (falls back to any user), creates short-lived JWT, audit-logs the action, and sets impersonating=true + impersonated_by so the frontend can render the banner. No 'exit' endpoint needed because stop is pure client-side token swap.

AppShell.jsx NAV_GROUPS / TENANT_NAV structure is clean — 5 groups + 17 items; hard-redirect for super-admin on tenant-only paths preserved; impersonation banner rendered at top when user.impersonating is true.

integrations.py abandon-cart builds a sane default reminder with name, cart_value, cart_url; validates E.164 phone and delay_minutes (1..10080). POSTs to scheduled_messages collection which the scheduler picks up — clean separation.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (sidebar IA, impersonation, Green Tick, zero-error boot all PASS; slash-popover + QR-modal full interior not fully exercised due to chat-row selector gap, but their data-testids are present and backend APIs green)

test_credentials: demo@test.com / demo1234 (tenant) + superadmin@wabridge.com / superadmin123 (super admin) — both verified
seed_data_creation: Transient: created + deleted quick-reply 'test_iter12'. Scheduled + drove-to-completion one cart-recovery doc against +919999999999 (Twilio rejects +9999 → row ends status=failed as expected). Scheduled + cancelled one cart-recovery doc against +919988776655. Created fresh API key TEST_iter12_cart for Demo Inc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration12_quickwin.py — 15 tests covering quick-replies CRUD + dup-400 + use-increment, super-admin impersonation token + forbidden-for-tenant, cart-recovery schedule/list/cancel + LIVE 120s scheduler completion check, plus simulate-inbound smoke. Scheduler interval is 30s; cart-recovery tests set delay_minutes=1, so expect ~60-90s latency before status=sent/failed. Demo tenant ID d7e4bbe1-b230-470b-98a4-9d30659d4d22. Twilio will always fail for +9999... numbers (expected — scheduled doc lands status=failed). Sidebar testid slug = label.replace(/\s|\/|&/g,'-').toLowerCase() so 'Leads & CRM' → 'nav-leads---crm' and 'Pricing & Discounts' → 'nav-pricing---discounts' (triple dash). Impersonation banner data-testid=\"impersonation-banner\", stop button data-testid=\"stop-impersonation\". Green Tick step checkboxes are data-testid=\"green-tick-step-{0..5}\" and persist to localStorage. Chat.jsx conversation rows do NOT have data-testid — future automation should either add them or locate rows via role + phone regex.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. One minor automation-friction observation: chat conversation rows in Chat.jsx lack data-testid, which blocked full UI traversal of the slash-trigger popover and quick-replies manage modal interior via Playwright. This is a testability gap, NOT a product bug — the testids manage-quick-replies / slash-popover / ctwa-badge themselves exist in the source and render correctly per first run (manage-quick-replies testid confirmed present on /app/chat). Recommend main agent add data-testid=\"conversation-{id}\" for future regression runs.
